query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count, COUNT(DISTINCT branchId) as branch_count FROM kpi_targets LIMIT 1;
SELECT branchId, dimension, COUNT(*) as count FROM kpi_targets GROUP BY branchId, dimension LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46m8FvVm7HSsc1z.root --database 6XmnMHSGkmqmcvGw6sxZ3M --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count, COUNT(DISTINCT branchId) as branch_count FROM kpi_targets LIMIT 1;
SELECT branchId, dimension, COUNT(*) as count FROM kpi_targets GROUP BY branchId, dimension LIMIT 10;
